items.claim: Jared Cannonier's durability has declined significantly due to his age.
items.quote: when you are have one of these granite chins and this durability, this infamous durability, it goes away. And when it goes, it goes fast.
I can't believe that at 42 you're going to continue to dodge that bullet.

items.claim: Alvin Hines is a non-professional fighter who works as an engineer.
items.quote: the 5-0 RJ Harris against the nonroided up engineer.

items.claim: Klein is a massive favorite against her opponent but the fight is closer than the odds suggest.
items.quote: Just a massive favorite against her toughest, you know, competitor. So, she should win, but it's women's fight, man. Reachi, she she will throw a lot of punches. Uh I just think this is uh way closer.

items.claim: Chase Hooper is prone to losing fights he is heavily favored in.
items.quote: if there's anybody who can drop the ball, we know it's Mr. Hooper.

items.claim: Chase Hooper has been knocked out twice by Mitch Ramirez.
items.quote: can't get knocked out a third time by Mitch Ramirez.
